text: assert CellInSquare(ly, gcc - ghalf, gcr, gcc, ghalf);
assert CellInSquare(ly, rx, gcr, gcc, ghalf);
assert IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, r - 1, c - 1, ghalf);
assert IsTriangle(a + wda, b + wdb, c + (k - wda - wdb));
assert x + y + z == a + b + c + k;
assert minutes == 2 * m - a - b - c + 1;
assert IsTriangle(a + 0, b + minutes, c + (minutes - 0 - minutes));
assert IsTriangle(a + minutes, b + 0, c + (minutes - minutes - 0));
assert IsTriangle(a + minutes, b + 0, c + (minutes - minutes - 0));
assert a + b + c + k <= 2 * m;
assert ValidChoice(y, b, r, m, m + 1, m + 2);
assert s[m] == ('a' as int + (m % k)) as char;
assert CountChar(s, ('a' as int + j) as char) == ExactCount(n, k, j);
assert ExactCount(n, k, j) >= n / k;
assert CountChar(s, ('a' as int + j) as char) >= n / k;
assert CountChar(('A' as int + wit) as char, s) < m;
assert upper[ii] == ('A' as int + ii) as char;
assert upper[minIdx] == ('A' as int + minIdx) as char;
assert ChapterNotCompletelyRead(chapter, k) by { var w := chapter.1; assert chapter.0 <= w <= chapter.1; assert w >= k; }
assert forall j | 0 <= j < n :: ans[j] == EffectiveCap(j, h, restrictions);
assert forall q | 0 <= q < |old_result| :: result[q] == old_result[q];
assert k < m by { if k == m { assert x == TriNum(m) == |t|; } }
assert forall j | x <= j < x + y :: t[j] == t[x];
assert t[..x] + t[x..x + y] == t[..x + y];
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, true, false, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, false, true, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, true, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, false, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, false, true) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, true, false);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, false, false, true) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, true, true, false);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, false, true, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, true, false, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, false, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, true, true);
assert FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, true, false, false, false) == FriendSum(a1, a2, a3, a4, false, true, true, true);
assert a + b + (a + b) == total / 2 + total / 2;
assert (a - x - w) + (b - (y - w)) + c == a + b + c - x - y;
assert a + b + c - x - y >= z;
assert x + w + (a - x - w) == a;
assert ValidAllocation(x, y, z, a, b, c, x, w, y - w, a - x - w, b - (y - w), c);
assert a - x - gd <= a + b - x - y;
assert (a - x - gd) + (b - (y - gd)) + c == a + b + c - x - y;
assert Feasible(a, b, c, rem, c2);
assert CandiesAfterDivision(b, c, a, s) == maxCandies;
assert CandiesAfterDivision(a, c, b, s) == maxCandies;
assert CandiesAfterDivision(a, b, c, s) == maxCandies;
assert ValidAssignment(pens, pencils, a, b, c, d, k);
assert SwapCost(a, b, la, lb) == da + db;
assert SwapCost(a, b, lb, la) == da + db;
assert (set p: int | lo <= p <= hi) == {};
assert (set p: int | lo <= p <= hi) == {lo};
assert s1 == s2 + {hi} by { forall p | p in s1 ensures p in s2 || p == hi {} forall p | p in s2 ensures p in s1 {} }
assert ValidDistribution(a, b, c, n, des - a, des - b, des - c);
assert forall p :: 0 <= p < n ==> arr[p] == a[p];
assert forall p, q :: 0 <= p < q <= j ==> arr[p] <= arr[q];

assert ContainsAllShaded(grid, top, bottom, left, right) by { forall r | 0 <= r < |grid| ensures forall c | 0 <= c < |grid[r]| :: grid[r][c] == '*' ==> (top <= r < bottom && left <= c < right) { asser
assert exists c | left <= c < right :: grid[top][c] == '*' by { var c0 :| 0 <= c0 < |grid[top]| && grid[top][c0] == '*'; assert left <= c0 < right; }
assert exists c | left <= c < right :: grid[bottom - 1][c] == '*' by { var c0 :| 0 <= c0 < |grid[bot]| && grid[bot][c0] == '*'; assert left <= c0 < right; }
assert TightBounds(grid, top, bottom, left, right);
assert IsMinimalBoundingBox(grid, result, top, bottom, left, right);
assert IsValidSolution(x, y, z, a, b, c);
assert a * y - a * (x + g) == a * (y - (x + g));
assert a * (x + g) == a * x + a * g;
assert a * y >= a * x + x;
assert s[j..j + n][wit] == s[j + wit] == s[n - 1] == c == w[wit];
